CoreProperties - Record Class in com.orasaka.core.engine

CoreProperties.McpConfig - Record Class in com.orasaka.core.engine

CoreProperties.OrchestrationConfig - Record Class in com.orasaka.core.engine
Configuration for the cognitive prompt orchestration pipeline.
CoreProperties.ProviderConfig - Record Class in com.orasaka.core.engine
Configuration for a specific AI provider.
CoreProperties.RagConfig - Record Class in com.orasaka.core.engine
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) configuration.
CoreProperties.RefinerConfig - Record Class in com.orasaka.core.engine

CoreProperties.RouterConfig - Record Class in com.orasaka.core.engine

CoreProperties.SystemContextConfig - Record Class in com.orasaka.core.engine
System context injector configuration details.
CoreProperties.UserContextConfig - Record Class in com.orasaka.core.engine
